tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $101.26 May 8 (+1.2%, CNBC; off D65 low $101.27; rallied on US-Iran fire exchange). Fire exchange May 7: US sinks 7 Iranian boats; Iran attacks USS Truxtun - miscalculation risk live. 14-point MOU review ongoing (Iran response within 48hrs via Pakistan); if MOU fails, Brent $125+ tail. Mine-clearing ~6 months on any deal - physical Hormuz reopening delayed. Stress (50%) + Tail (35%) = 85% continued disruption. Stop-loss: confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + P&I restoration (Brent sub-$90). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $101.26 May 8 (+1.2%, CNBC); ASEAN Energy ~138.5 est. (-1.4%); ASEAN Banks ~182.0 est. (+3.7%); iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (-2bp est.); ASEAN HY ~558bp (-4bp est.). Fire exchange May 7 - US sinks 7 Iranian boats; Iran attacks USS Truxtun - MOU talks ongoing. Shipping equities +7.0% est. on Hormuz reopening hopes. ASEAN Energy long under pressure at $101 (down from $108 D63); Banks risk-on rally. Tail (35%): fire exchange escalation drives Brent $125+, iTraxx 230-260bp. Conviction medium on both legs.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~57.60 est. (-0.4% May 8; PHP strengthened on MOU deal optimism). Mark-to-market against position; MOU talks reduce near-term PHP weakness catalyst. Fire exchange May 7 keeps tail alive - if MOU fails, PHP weakens on re-escalation. USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay retains tail hedge value. Stop-loss: confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + P&I restoration below 57.00. Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,750 est. (-0.5% May 8; IDR strengthened on MOU deal optimism). Brent $101.26 May 8 - ICP overshoot ~$31/bbl, fiscal pressure eased from D63 peak but still severe. Mark-to-market against position; approaching stop-loss at 16,600. Fire exchange May 7 keeps re-escalation risk alive - if MOU fails, IDR weakens on Brent spike. Hold at half-size. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,600 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 210bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (-2bp May 8 est.); ASEAN HY ~558bp (-4bp est.). Fire exchange May 7 (US sinks 7 Iranian boats; Iran attacks USS Truxtun) validates holding CDS protection - miscalculation risk live inside Hormuz. MOU talks ongoing; spreads tightened from 192bp D63 peak. Mine-clearing ~6 months post-deal; full commercial reopening delayed. Hold CDS protection at trimmed size; tail (35%): fire exchange escalation drives iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (50%) stabilises 175-210bp. Remove at confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + spreads below 165bp. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Talks Collapse
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $16.84 May 7 (+0.0%, TradingEconomics confirmed, carried to May 8); TTF €44.84 May 7 (+2.13%, TradingEconomics confirmed, carried). JKM-TTF spread widened modestly vs D63 (JKM up, TTF down). Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months regardless of MOU. Fire exchange May 7 clouds MOU timeline - nuclear stalemate maintains structural JKM premium vs TTF. Stress target $18-22 JKM; tail target $26-30. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (-2bp May 8 est.) - MOU talks tightened spreads from 192bp D63 peak; fire exchange May 7 (US-Iran in Hormuz) validates urgency. Execute any residual private placements now. Tail (35%): fire exchange escalation targets 230-260bp. Window remains narrow - Hormuz reopening delayed 6 months regardless of MOU outcome.

Brent $101.26 May 8 (+1.2%, CNBC); THB ~33.10 est. (-0.4%); Thailand 10Y ~2.22% est. (-6bp); tail risk 35%. Fire exchange May 7 (US-Iran in Hormuz); MOU talks ongoing. PTTEP EBITDA still solid at $101 Brent - execute USD H2 prefunding now while credit windows remain open; risk-on environment post-D65 MOU rally creates short window. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review urgent.

iTraxx Asia IG ~182bp (-2bp May 8 est.); USD/SGD ~1.2720 est. (-0.2%); Brent $101.26 May 8. MOU talks + fire exchange May 7; spreads tightened from 192bp D63 peak on deal optimism. Maintain full USD hedging; revolving-credit window: risk-on rally since D65 creates a short window. Tail (35%): fire exchange escalation targets 230bp+; execute revolving-credit expansion without delay.

ASEAN HY ~558bp (-4bp May 8 est.); Brent $101.26 May 8. MOU talks tightened spreads from 577bp D63 peak; fire exchange May 7 limits further compression. Hyflux desalination power cost trajectory still elevated. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms. Tail (35%): fire exchange escalation pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
